end,function(z)local G,x=-299774+299775,z[-452652-(-452653)]while x do k[x],G=k[x]-(-921822-(-921823)),(910760-910759)+G if 626824-626824==k[x]then k[x],Q[x]=nil,nil end x=z[G]end end,function(z,G)local S=c(G)local r=function(...)return x(z,{...},G,S)end return r end,function(z,G)local S=c(G)local r=function(r,f)return x(z,{r;f},G,S)end return r
